{{CargoRelic
|name=Auspicious Cloud Knot
|class_id=20165
|rank=Green
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=Arrayed silk threads make it exquisite and gorgeous, symbolizing endless auspiciousness. Loved by people because of their auspicious connotations, they are the most desired Spring Festival blessings!
|fame=16
|art=32
|fth=13
|civ=14
|tech=15
|ss1=Per 10 Lucky Coins gained, Snail ATK +2<br>Lucky Coins Gained: 400/400
|ss2=Per 10 Lucky Coins gained, Snail ATK +4<br>Lucky Coins Gained: 400/400
|ss3=Per 10 Lucky Coins gained, Snail ATK +6<br>Lucky Coins Gained: 400/400
|ss4=Per 10 Lucky Coins gained, Snail ATK +6<br>Lucky Coins Gained: 400/400
|ss7=Per 10 Lucky Coins gained, Snail ATK +6<br>Lucky Coins Gained: 400/400<br> (Awakened)
}}
